text:
- [escalation] Andy: Daily correspondence summary from Jeeves mentioning an escalation from Andrew Lang requiring immediate attention.
- [reply needed] Zamzar Limited: Zamzar Limited unable to process recent payment and requests update of payment details.
- [reply needed] Andy: Andrew Lang is asking Michael a reflective question about trying to change or fix people.
- [decision required] Zamzar: Zamzar is reporting a billing issue and requesting updated payment details to process a recent payment.
- [scheduling] Peter Nordlund: Peter Nordlund invites Matt and Michael to June 19 Scriptural Reasoning event and asks about bringing cut-up fruit.
- [scheduling] Alan Beasley: Alan Beasley is sharing a chapter from Mark's book for a Loder Group discussion scheduled for 10am on Saturday, June 27.
- [scheduling] Sarah Moyer: Sarah Moyer updates arrival time to 12:30 due to missing the 10:30 ferry and declines food offer.
- [scheduling] "Rob Collins & Esther Wakeman": Rob Collins and Esther Wakeman propose meeting at 11:30 for lunch before an event and ask to print a ticket and return a backpack.
- [follow up] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch is responding in a thread about posting a flat file of a 'home' page, suggesting to skip rotating quotes to save time.
